description: Caller asks legal/loan questions the agent can't answer. The agent explicitly flags Needs Human = true (the explicit-signal path, distinct from the low-confidence path).
transcript:
Agent: Hi Farhan, this is Priya from Prestige about the Kochi project. Is now okay?
Caller: Yes. Can you tell me the exact stamp duty, the NRI loan eligibility, and whether the title is litigation-free with the sub-registrar?
Agent: Those are detailed legal and finance questions — let me have our relationship manager call you with precise answers.
Caller: Okay, please have them call me tomorrow.
Agent: Will arrange that. Thank you.

Call Outcome.subjective: Genuinely interested but asked detailed legal/finance questions; needs RM follow-up.

Needs Human.reasoning_objective: Caller asked stamp-duty, NRI-loan, and title-litigation questions beyond the agent's scope.
